title: Privacy Policy
content: ZION LED USA (“we,” “our,” or “us”) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. 1. Information We Collect When you submit a form on our website or through our advertisements, we may collect: Full Name Email Address Phone Number Company Name (if provided) ZIP Code or Location Project Details 2. How We Use Your Information We use the information you provide to: Respond to your inquiries Provide project quotations and pricing Discuss commercial LED lighting solutions Follow up regarding your project requirements We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. 3. Information Sharing Your information may be shared only with authorized team members or service providers necessary to respond to your inquiry. 4. Data Security We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse. 5. Third-Party Platforms If you submit your information through platforms such as Facebook or Google, your information may also be subject to their respective privacy policies. 6. Contact Us If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: ZION LED USA Email: contact@zionledusa.com Phone: 642-006-0756
